latin: Captivus, qui viginti annos in carcere fuerat, per cuniculum quem ipse foderat evasit. amicus eius postea dixit: 'aut strenue vive, aut strenue morere.'

questions.target: Through a tunnel he had dug himself
choices: Through a tunnel he had dug himself

questions.prompt: What life advice does his friend give?
questions.target: Get busy living or get busy dying
choices: Get busy living or get busy dying

translation: A prisoner, who had been in prison for twenty years, escaped through a tunnel he himself had dug. His friend later said: 'Get busy living, or get busy dying.'
